name: Hare and Hounds
author: traditional / AGP port
description: Asymmetric hunt (a.k.a. the Soldier's Game / Le Jeu Militaire) on the classic 11-point board. Three Hounds (seat 0) try to corner the lone Hare (seat 1). The Hounds may move forward or sideways but never back toward their own end; the Hare moves any direction. The Hare wins by slipping past to the Hounds' end, or if the Hounds stall.
